TERM SHEET — SERIES C FINANCING (THAILAND)

Issuer: Lotus Group Plc.
Investor: Asia Frontier Capital Limited.
Lead negotiator on behalf of the Issuer: Mr Somchai Wattanapong, national ID 1-2345-67890-12-3.

Round Size: THB 3.5 billion.
Pre-Money Valuation: THB 18 billion.
Closing: Q1 2027, subject to definitive agreements and confidential due diligence.
Contact: somchai.w@lotus.co.th
